query:
CREATE TABLE `retail_bundle_cost_inputs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`bundleId` int NOT NULL,
	`slotType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`label` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`monthlyCostExGst` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL,
	`costSource` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',
	`linkedServiceId` int,
	`linkedServiceExternalId` varchar(128),
	`notes` text,
	`isActive` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `retail_bundle_cost_inputs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `retail_bundles` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`oneBillAccountNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`customerExternalId` varchar(128),
	`subscriberName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`rawBundleComponents` text NOT NULL,
	`hasInternet` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`hasSim` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`hasVoip` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`hasHardware` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`hasSupport` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`isByod` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`legacyProductName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`standardProductName` varchar(256) DEFAULT '',
	`retailPriceExGst` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL,
	`matchConfidence` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'none',
	`matchMethod` varchar(64) DEFAULT '',
	`isActive` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `retail_bundles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `retail_bundles` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`oneBillAccountNumber` varchar(64) NOT NULL,

	`rawBundleComponents` text NOT NULL,

	`hasVoip` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

	`standardProductName` varchar(256) DEFAULT '',
	`retailPriceExGst` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL,
	`matchConfidence` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'none',
	`matchMethod` varchar(64) DEFAULT '',
	`isActive` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `retail_bundles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
